ProductVariantInventoryPolicy.description: The inventory policy for a product variant controls whether customers can continue to buy the variant when it is out of stock. When the value is continue, customers are able to buy the variant when it's out of stock. When the value is deny, customers can't buy the variant when it's out of stock. * DENY: Stop selling a product variant when it is out of stock. * CONTINUE: Continue selling a product variant when it is out of stock.

CountryCode.description: ISO 3166-1 alpha-2 country codes with some differences

ScopeSettings.description:
Accepts a hash map of `ResourceScope`s to `ResourceAccessLevel`s `ResourceScope`s: - SELLING_PLAN - SUBSCRIPTION - BILL - PRODUCT - CUSTOMER - ORDER - ANALYTICS - CUSTOMER_PORTAL_THEME - STORE_DATA - EMAIL_CONFIG - SMS_CONFIG - INTEGRATIONS_CONFIG - WEBHOOK

`ResourceAccessLevel`s: - 0: NONE - 1: READ - 2: READ_AND_WRITE - 3: AUTH_ONLY - 4: SUPER_USER_ONLY

ISmartrrOrderStatus.description: - `open`: being fulfilled / is fulfilled - `closed`: either fulfilled or "archived" by vendor - `cancelled`: cancelled by vendor

MailingAddressType.description: * FOR_CUSTOMER: this type is for both a billing and mailing address: https://shopify.dev/docs/admin-api/graphql/reference/common-objects/mailingaddress

secretApiKey.description: some integrations (e.g. Klaviyo) may have a "private" API

YYYY-MM-DDTHH:mm:ss.sssZ

get.description:
Contacts Stripe Oauth to get token and saves payment method to DB
HTML page is used to send a stripe authorization token back to the window opener.
``` window.opener.postMessage({  "access_token":"...",
  "livemode":false,
  "refresh_token":"...",
  "token_type":"bearer",
  "stripe_publishable_key":"...",
  "stripe_user_id":"...",
  "scope":"read_write"
}, "*") ```

get.description:
Get all Simple Analytics for org.

You will pass in a `startDate` and `endDate` to filter for subscriptions active in that date range.

The response will contain active subscription count and active subscriber count for each day in the date range.

parameters.name: startDate
parameters.description: Include orders only after this date. See endpoint description for more info on how filters work.

parameters.name: endDate
parameters.description: Include orders only after this date. See endpoint description for more info on how filters work.
